query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of a portion of a human face, showing skin tones in warm pinkish-beige against darker surrounding areas, with a diagonal dark form crossing the lower right quadrant and a pale triangular shape in the lower left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely blurred, fragmentary close-up in muted, desaturated warm tones where facial features dissolve into indistinct pinkish skin texture against deep shadow, with heavy soft-focus obscuring all defining contours and a diagonal dark obstruction slicing across the lower frame, rendering the subject nearly abstract and unrecognizable.
